display.purpose: Hero statement only, one per page. Fraunces serif, big and tight.

title.purpose: Project and subsection headings. Fraunces serif.

body.purpose: All prose. Geist Mono, capped at 70ch, Paper Muted.

label.purpose: Nav, meta, section numbers, badges. Geist Mono uppercase, 0.08em.

shadows.name: hard-offset
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system. Brutalist offset block on the AI demo container only.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and entrance reveals.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-emphasis action per view. Dark text on amber, hard corners, uppercase mono.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); color: oklch(0.17 0.008 65); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.70 0.16 60); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.76 0.16 65); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Rule-line border that shifts to amber on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.95 0.01 80); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.33 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.76 0.16 65); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Status only. Amber square plus uppercase mono on a tinted ground. Hard corners.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(0.30 0.05 65); color: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 0; } .ds-badge-mark { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); display: inline-block; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Surface input. Border shifts to amber on focus with an amber caret. No glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Paste text to transform" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.21 0.008 65); color: oklch(0.95 0.01 80); caret-color: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.7; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.33 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; width: 100%; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.56 0.01 70); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.76 0.16 65); }

components.name: AI Demo Container
components.description: Signature component. The proof of product sense. Carries the only shadow in the system.
components.html:
LIVE DEMO / TONE SHIFTER
Output renders here in mono, with a brief eased reveal.
components.css: .ds-demo { background: oklch(0.21 0.008 65); color: oklch(0.95 0.01 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.33 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 oklch(0.33 0.008 65); padding: 32px; } .ds-demo-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.74 0.012 75); padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.33 0.008 65); } .ds-demo-mark { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); display: inline-block; } .ds-demo-body { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.7; color: oklch(0.74 0.012 75); padding-top: 16px; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Header navigation. Uppercase mono, amber underline on active.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.74 0.012 75); text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: oklch(0.95 0.01 80); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: oklch(0.95 0.01 80); border-bottom-color: oklch(0.76 0.16 65); }

narrative.overview: A warm machine in a dark room. Structure is exposed, like a well-set page proof with the grid lines left visible. The ground is a warm near-black, never navy, never pure black. Type does the heavy lifting: an editorial serif for voice and a monospace for everything procedural. One amber signal is the only color, used like a cursor blink: rare, deliberate, alive. The brutalist shell is the discipline; the warmth in the serif and the amber is the human.
keyCharacteristics: Warm near-black ground (oklch(0.17 0.008 65)), never navy, never #000
Depth from 1px rule lines and surface lightness steps, not shadows
Hard corners (0 to 4px); pills are forbidden
Fraunces serif for voice, Geist Mono for structure and meta
Amber on under 10% of any screen; its rarity is the signal
Motion is responsive feedback only: state transitions and subtle entrance reveals

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Amber appears on no more than 10% of any given screen. Reserve it for the single thing you most want someone to do or notice.

rules.name: The No Navy Rule
rules.body: The dark ground is warm (hue 65), never blue. If the background reads cool, the chroma or hue is wrong.

rules.name: The No Gradient Text Rule
rules.body: Text is never rendered with background-clip: text over a gradient. Emphasis comes from weight, size, or the amber.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Serif speaks, mono operates. Never set body prose in the serif, never set a hero statement in mono.

rules.name: The Weight Floor Rule
rules.body: Never use a weight below 400. 400 is the floor for prose, 500 for labels and headings.

rules.name: The Rule Line Rule
rules.body: Separation and depth come from 1px borders and surface lightness steps, never soft shadows.

rules.name: The State-Response Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth moves only as a border shift to amber or a one-step lighter surface, on hover or focus.

dos: Do use Signal Amber for exactly one action or focal point per viewport.
Do keep the ground warm (hue 65) and near-black; never navy, never #000.
Do convey depth with 1px Rule Lines and surface lightness steps, not soft shadows.
Do keep corners hard (0 to 4px); reserve the single Hard Offset shadow for the AI demo only.
Do split the type: Fraunces serif speaks, Geist Mono operates. Cap body prose at 70ch.
Do write specific, in-voice empty, loading, and error states for the AI demo.
Do keep motion to responsive feedback under 300ms, ease-out.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient).
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't use glassmorphism or decorative backdrop-filter: blur.
Don't use particle backgrounds, aurora animations, or scroll-driven choreography.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't build identical icon-grid card walls.
Don't use dark navy with neon or gradient accents.
Don't fall into cold brutalism: raw structure that sacrifices legibility.
Don't reintroduce any chat or message-bubble UI.
Don't use pills (rounded-full) on any element.
